SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.hazid

Class HazopConsequenceMapping

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.hazid.HazopConsequenceMapping
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class HazopConsequenceMapping extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable mapping of a single HAZOP guide-word/parameter deviation to the NeqSim calculation that quantifies its consequence, the applicable industry standard, and a typical safeguard.

The mapping encodes engineering knowledge used by HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator to seed a HAZOP worksheet with simulation-backed consequence descriptions instead of empty "TBD" placeholders. Each instance links one HAZOPTemplate.GuideWord/HAZOPTemplate.Parameter combination to:

  • the physical consequence mechanism (what physically happens),
  • the recommended NeqSim calculator class that screens or sizes the scenario,
  • the governing standard reference, and
  • a typical engineered safeguard.

References:

  • IEC 61882 — HAZOP studies application guide
  • CCPS — Guidelines for Hazard Evaluation Procedures, 3rd Ed.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • HazopConsequenceMapping

      public HazopConsequenceMapping(HAZOPTemplate.GuideWord guideWord, HAZOPTemplate.Parameter parameter, String consequenceMechanism, String recommendedCalculator, String standardReference, String typicalSafeguard)
      Construct an immutable consequence mapping.
      Parameters:
      guideWord - HAZOP guide-word (must not be null)
      parameter - HAZOP process parameter (must not be null)
      consequenceMechanism - physical consequence mechanism description (must not be null)
      recommendedCalculator - recommended NeqSim calculator name (must not be null)
      standardReference - governing industry standard reference (must not be null)
      typicalSafeguard - typical engineered safeguard (must not be null)
